title: jobboard.application.received payload (v1)
description: Emitted (best-effort) when an inbound job-board application is ingested from an external provider. Producer: job-service (apps/job-service/src/routes/inbound-job-application.ts). HONEST NOTES: (1) no subscriber consumes this subject today; (2) the subject domain `jobboard` (tenant.{tenantId}.jobboard.application.received) is NOT covered by any stream in packages/nats-client CORE_STREAMS, so unless a JOBBOARD stream is added the publish will fail to persist — the producer wraps it in try/catch and only publishes when NATS_URL is set, so a missing stream is non-fatal. Documented from the real payload interface.
x-stream: (none declared — no matching subject in CORE_STREAMS)

provider.description: External provider key (ProviderKey — e.g. linkedin, wellfound, ziprecruiter, naukri).

resumeForwarded.description: True when the resume was forwarded to resume-service for parsing.
